task: B2B SMB CRM copilots and automation trends

result.json_content: {"result":"Key B2B SMB CRM copilot and automation trends for 2024 include: 91 % of SMBs using AI report revenue boosts, 75 % are actively experimenting with AI, and growing SMBs plan to increase AI investment next year at nearly twice the pace of declining peers. Top AI-driven CRM use cases are campaign optimization, content generation, automated recommendations, natural-language search, and service chatbots. Microsoft’s Copilot is extending from conversation builder to full workflow automation and integrates across Dynamics 365 CRM/ERP; HubSpot’s free CRM automates lead scoring, email follow-ups, meeting scheduling, and reporting; Zoho’s AI assistant Zia offers generative-AI module/workflow creation, churn prediction, trend detection, email sentiment, call transcription, and one-click automation. Challenges for SMBs are data-quality readiness, siloed systems, skills gaps, integration costs, and security concerns; successful adopters share traits of strong data-management focus, integrated tech stack, and trusted-vendor selection."}
